2603.22329.title: Trained Persistent Memory for Frozen Decoder-Only LLMs
2603.22329.paper_summary: Decoder-only language models are stateless: hidden representations are discarded after every forward pass and nothing persists across sessions. Jeong (2026a) showed that trained memory adapters give a frozen encoder-decoder backbone persistent latent-space memory, building on the lateral-memory framework of Jeong (2026b,c). Here we ask whether the same principle transfers to the decoder-only setting, where no cross-attention pathway exists and memory must enter through self-attention alone. We adapt six methods -- prefix, parallel cross-attention, KV extension, Hebbian memory, context-gated branch, and slot-based sparse write -- to a frozen GPT-2, training only a small adapter $θ_{mem}$. The write rule is shared; only the read injection changes from decoder cross-attention to self-attention KV prefix or parallel branch. On LoCoMo we find a striking inductive-bias dichotomy: at $1\times$ capacity, three methods with strong architectural priors -- cross-attention (M.2), Hebbian (M.4), and slot write (M.6) -- achieve retained-memory scores of $7-18\%$ and knowledge gains $ΔK$ of $7-10$, while the other three fail ($< 0.4\%$). At $10\times$ capacity all six converge, showing the gap is architectural, not fundamental. Together with the encoder-decoder results of Jeong (2026a) and the brain-inspired modules of Jeong (2026b,c), these findings establish persistent latent-space memory as a general paradigm spanning major transformer families.
2603.22329.paper_summary_zh: 解碼器專用的語言模型是無狀態的：隱藏表示在每次前向傳遞後被丟棄，並且在會話之間沒有任何持續的記憶。Jeong (2026a) 顯示，訓練過的記憶適配器使得凍結的編碼器-解碼器骨架具備持久的潛在空間記憶，這基於 Jeong (2026b,c) 的側向記憶框架。在這裡，我們探討相同的原則是否可以轉移到僅解碼器的設置中，因為在這裡不存在交叉注意力通道，記憶必須僅通過自注意力進入。我們將六種方法——前綴、並行交叉注意力、KV 擴展、Hebbian 記憶、上下文門控分支和基於槽的稀疏寫入——適配到凍結的 GPT-2，僅訓練一個小型適配器 $θ_{mem}$。寫入規則是共享的；只有讀取注入從解碼器交叉注意力變為自注意力 KV 前綴或並行分支。在 LoCoMo 上，我們發現一個引人注目的歧異性偏見：在 $1\times$ 容量下，三種具有強架構先驗的方法——交叉注意力 (M.2)、Hebbian (M.4) 和槽寫入 (M.6)——達到的保留記憶分數為 $7-18\%$，知識增益 $ΔK$ 為 $7-10$，而另外三種則失敗（$< 0.4\%$）。在 $10\times$ 容量下，所有六種方法收斂，顯示出差距是架構性的，而非根本性的。結合 Jeong (2026a) 的編碼器-解碼器結果以及 Jeong (2026b,c) 的腦啟發模塊，這些發現確立了持久的潛在空間記憶作為一個跨越主要Transformer家族的一般範式。
2603.22329.author: Hong Jeong et.al.
